import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let t = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    if tok == t
      count = count + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
